title: leucocera horrida
intro: Leucocera horrida, also known as the hairy root or devil's claw, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Leucocera horrida has been used to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, fever, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various ailments.
